name: token-optimizer
description: Context-window optimization: caching, compression, and smart file tooling that cut token usage 60-90%.

interface.shortDescription: Cut token usage 60-90% with caching, compression, and smart file tools.
interface.longDescription: Bundles the token-optimizer MCP server plus a usage skill. smart_read returns diffs on re-reads, smart_glob returns paths only, optimize_session stashes bulky output out-of-context, and get_optimization_report shows total tokens saved.
defaultPrompt: Use token-optimizer smart_read to re-read this large file as a diff.
Show my token savings with get_optimization_report.
